description: CARFAX One-Owner.  Deep Black Pearl 2025 Volkswagen Atlas 2.0T SEL Premium R-Line AWD 2.0L TSI Fresh Oil Change.  Experience premium design, power, and versatility in this 2025 Volkswagen Atlas 2.0T SEL Premium R-Line a full-size SUV that redefines modern luxury and performance. Built to impress with bold styling and advanced technology, the Atlas SEL Premium R-Line delivers exceptional comfort for every passenger and confidence on every drive.  Under the hood, a 2.0L turbocharged 4-cylinder engine paired with an 8-speed automatic transmission provides refined power and smooth acceleration. The 4 MOTION all-wheel drive system ensures stability and traction in all road conditions, while the R-Line sport styling adds a commanding presence with unique exterior accents, sculpted lines, and 21-inch alloy wheels.  Inside, the cabin is crafted for comfort and sophistication with premium leather seating, heated and ventilated front seats, heated second-row seats, and a heated steering wheel. The three-row configuration offers generous space for passengers and cargo, enhanced by a panoramic sunroof that floods the cabin with natural light.  Technology takes center stage with the Digital Cockpit Pro, 12-inch touchscreen infotainment system, navigation, and Harman Kardon premium audio system. Enjoy seamless connectivity through wireless Apple CarPlay, Android Auto, and wireless charging, while customizable ambient lighting adds a touch of modern elegance.  Safety and driver assistance are top priorities with IQ.DRIVE, featuring Adaptive Cruise Control, Lane Assist, Front Assist, Blind Spot Monitoring, Parking Assist, and a 360 Area View Camera, giving you peace of mind in every situation.  Powerful, refined, and beautifully equipped, this 2025 Volkswagen Atlas 2.0T SEL Premium R-Line combines bold performance with first-class comfort  making it the perfect SUV for families and drivers who expect nothing less than exceptional. With apologies to all our customers, past and future: All of our competitors advertise cars using price structures that get their cars seen online, while no one sees ours.  And so, after 25 years of business, we have to experiment with THEIR system.  Therefore our advertised prices on third-party advertisers reflect a $2500 down payment or equivalent trade. It is NOT a HIDDEN FEE: we are completely up front and honest about why we have to try it. Our website clearly states the pricing on every vehicle. Third Party advertisers like Carfax, Cargurus and Autotrader etc. reward this price structure with better placement and badges.  We have been asking third party advertisers for many years to give us a level playing field. We always succeed on a level playing field. Our competitors have downpayments between $2500-$9000 or even a % of price, then add hidden fees or require financing through them. Some dealers will not list a downpayment in their ads and you only find out when you go to see the vehicle. With us, financing is not required, but if you prefer to, we work with many banks to get you the best terms.   We are sorry for any inconvenience, but pure pricing placed our vehicles at the bottom of search lists. We had no choice but to try advertising their way so that you can at least see our inventory, and hopefully we will do business. We have been selling quality cars with great reviews for 25 years. Experience the perfect blend of style comfort and reliability with this 2012 Honda Odyssey EX-L w/Navi. Dressed in a sleek Alabaster Silver Metallic exterior this minivan is designed to make every journey enjoyable. Under the hood lies a robust 3.5L V6 engine delivering an impressive 248 horsepower and 250 lb-ft of torque ensuring smooth performance whether you're navigating city streets or cruising on the highway.
Step inside to discover a world of luxury and convenience. The spacious interior features premium leather seats that are heated for those chilly mornings while the sunroof/moonroof offers an open-air feel for sunny days. It is very clean, reliable, and well maintained. We offer a unique pay plan that is known for being the easiest and fastest financing option in the PA area. To get this car, you put $2500 down then pay either $100 a week or $200 bi-weekly on a principal balance of $8400, which you will typically pay off in a little under two years. Its that simple. We call it BUY HERE PAY HERE, so no banks, no finance companies, and most important, no credit checks. This program is available to everybody. There is a reason we have been here for over 30 years. While most dealerships buy their cars from auctions, we only buy from new car dealerships so they run better, and last longer. Every car comes with a free warranty and we have multiple warranty programs that provide the best coverage to our customers. All you need to drive off is a license, insurance, your down payment (Cash, Money Order or Credit-Debit Card), and proof of income (paystubs, SSI letter or check, etc.). Everybody is guaranteed to drive off and we have tons of beautiful vehicles waiting for a buyer, so stop in today! Interest and tax/tags are not included.

description: Discover the perfect blend of style, performance, and advanced technology with this 2019 Mazda CX-5 Grand Touring AWD. This sophisticated SUV is designed to elevate your driving experience, providing both comfort and capability for all your adventures. Under the hood, you'll find a robust 2.5L 4-cylinder engine that effortlessly balances power and efficiency, making it ideal for both city commutes and weekend getaways. The exterior exudes elegance with sleek lines and a commanding presence, while the interior offers a sanctuary of luxury and convenience. Enjoy seamless connectivity with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, ensuring you stay connected and entertained on the go. description: Refined comfort meets rugged capability in this 2019 Jeep Grand Cherokee Limited 4WD a midsize SUV designed for drivers who want versatility with upscale features. With seating for five passengers and versatile cargo space the Grand Cherokee adapts easily to family trips business or leisure.With its bold design upscale interior and proven Jeep durability this 2019 Grand Cherokee Limited is the perfect SUV for drivers in Philadelphia who want capability comfort and style in one package. Financing for Every Customer
We are proud to offer flexible financing solutions for all credit profileswhether your credit history is limited challenged or well-established. All financing is subject to lender approval and the dealerships standard terms and conditions.
General Disclaimer
The information provided is a guideline only. Please consult a Key Automotive Sales & Service representative for complete details.
- Financing Terms
- Financing arranged through Key Automotive is subject to credit approval; finance charges may apply.
- The Discounted Price is available only when one of the following applies:
- Cash payment
- Customer-arranged financing or
- Financing arranged by Key Automotive through one of these qualifying lenders: Wells Fargo Home Loan Auto Loan Ally Bank Citadel FCU Lentegrity or OneMain Financial.
- Additional Costs
- Prices exclude tax title tags and documentation fee.
- All vehicles are subject to prior sale.
- Key Automotive Sales & Service and Dealer Car Search assume no responsibility for typographical errors or misprints regarding price equipment mileage or other data. Please verify all information before purchase.
- Savings-Discount Requirements
- To secure the advertised savings the purchaser must also select one or more qualifying products offered by the dealership such as:
- Extended Vehicle Service Contract (Warranty)
- Guaranteed Asset Protection (GAP) or
- Other approved ancillary protections.
- Customers who decline these products may still purchase the vehicle at the advertised price plus a dealer destination fee of $895.
Representative Payment Example
Estimated monthly payment is based on the discounted vehicle price a 72-month term 4.95 % APR and a $1000 down payment. Actual terms will vary according to lender approval creditworthiness and the specific vehicle selected.
For full program details or to confirm vehicle availability please contact our sales team at 215-399-7300 or visit us in person. We look forward to earning your business!

description: ==== Unleash Extreme Capability with a Used 2024 GMC Sierra 1500 AT4X ====Prepare to conquer any terrain in style with this exceptional *Used 2024 GMC Sierra 1500 AT4X*, now available at *Stuckey Mitsubishi State College*. As the pinnacle of GMC's off-road lineup, this truck masterfully combines rugged capability with the utmost in premium luxury. It's the ultimate vehicle for adventurers and professionals alike in *State College, Altoona, and Pittsburgh*, ready to handle everything from challenging trails to the daily grind across *Blair, Centre, and Allegheny Counties*.=== Extreme Off-Road Performance and Powertrain ===The 2024 Sierra 1500 AT4X is engineered for uncompromising performance, on or off the pavement.  *   *Powerful Engine Options:* This AT4X comes standard with a potent *3.0L Duramax Turbo-Diesel engine* delivering *305 horsepower* and a class-leading *495 lb-ft of torque*. An even more powerful *6.2L V8 engine* with *420 horsepower* is also available, both paired with a smooth 10-speed automatic transmission.  *   *Specialized Off-Road Hardware:* The AT4X is equipped with exclusive features like *Multimatic? DSSV dampers* for superior suspension travel, front and rear *e-locking differentials* for maximum traction, and a factory-installed *2-inch suspension lift*. These features make it perfect for tackling the most demanding landscapes in *Huntingdon* or *Clinton County*.  *   *Impressive Towing:* Despite its off-road focus, this truck offers a robust towing capacity. When properly equipped, it can tow up to *8,700 lbs* with the 6.2L V8 engine.=== Premium Interior and Advanced Technology ===The interior of the AT4X is designed to provide an athletic yet luxurious experience, rivaling high-end SUVs.  *   *Obsidian Rush Interior:* The cabin features an exclusive Obsidian Rush interior with full-grain leather seating, authentic Vanta Ash wood trim, and a microsuede headliner. The front seats are *16-way power-adjustable with a massage feature*, ensuring maximum comfort after a long day of work or play.  *   *Cutting-Edge Infotainment:* A massive *13.4-inch diagonal center touchscreen* with *Google built-in* and a *12.3-inch digital driver information center* provides a seamless and intuitive user experience. Wireless *Apple CarPlay® and Android Auto?* are standard, keeping you connected on the go.  *   *Premium Audio:* Enjoy a world-class audio experience with the standard *12-speaker Bose® Premium Series with CenterPoint Surround Sound*, perfect for long drives to *Harrisburg* or *Lewistown*.=== Comprehensive Safety for Confidence ===The 2024 Sierra 1500 AT4X is equipped with the GMC Pro Safety suite and additional advanced features to keep you secure.  *   *GMC Pro Safety:* This suite includes *Automatic Emergency Braking, Forward Collision Alert, Front Pedestrian Braking*, and *Lane Keep Assist with Lane Departure Warning*.  *   *Enhanced Features:* For the AT4X, safety is further enhanced with *HD Surround Vision*, *Front and Rear Park Assist*, and *Trailer Side Blind Zone Alert*, providing a complete view and extra peace of mind when navigating crowded areas or towing in *Selinsgrove* and *Mifflin County*.This outstanding *Used 2024 GMC Sierra 1500 AT4X* is a prime choice for anyone in *Snyder, Juniata, or Dauphin Counties* seeking a powerful, luxurious, and uniquely capable truck. description: Introducing the 2012 Dodge Charger SE, a full-size sedan that combines performance with practicality. With under 116,000 miles on the odometer, this vehicle has averaged less than 9,000 miles per year, demonstrating careful ownership and reliable usage. It also comes with a clean CARFAX report, ensuring peace of mind regarding its history.  The 2012 Charger SE is equipped with a 3.6-liter V6 engine that produces 292 horsepower, delivering a balanced mix of power and efficiency. This model features a smooth 5-speed automatic transmission, providing a responsive driving experience whether you're navigating city streets or cruising on the highway.  Exterior highlights include the Chargers bold and aerodynamic design, characterized by its signature crosshair grille and sculpted body lines. The vehicle is fitted with 17-inch alloy wheels, which contribute to both its sporty appearance and handling capabilities. Additionally, the standard halogen headlamps and LED taillights enhance visibility and ensure a modern look.  Inside, the Charger SE offers a spacious cabin that comfortably seats five passengers. The interior is thoughtfully designed with high-quality materials and a functional layout. Standard features include cloth upholstery, a six-way power-adjustable drivers seat, and a split-folding rear seat for added cargo flexibility. The vehicle also comes with air conditioning, power windows, and power door locks for convenience.  Entertainment options include a four-speaker audio system with a CD player, auxiliary audio jack, and an available USB port, providing various options for your listening pleasure. Additionally, the Charger is equipped with a standard 4.3-inch touchscreen display, allowing easy access to audio settings and vehicle information.  Safety is a priority in the 2012 Charger SE, which comes with an array of standard safety features, including front and rear side curtain airbags, antilock brakes, and stability control. The vehicle also includes a tire pressure monitoring system to help maintain optimal performance.  Overall, the 2012 Dodge Charger SE is a reliable sedan that offers a blend of performance, comfort, and safety, making it an excellent choice for anyone in search of a well-rounded vehicle.

description: The 2012 Mercedes-Benz R 350 is a rare and thoughtful blend of luxury sedan comfort, SUV versatility, and Mercedes-Benz refinement. Finished in elegant Palladium Silver Metallic and paired with a warm, inviting Oyster leather interior, this R-Class offers an elevated driving experience that few vehicles can match. This is the perfect vehicle for those who value space, serenity, and sophisticationwithout sacrificing performance. Panorama Sunroof  Open and Airy The expansive panorama power sunroof fills the cabin with natural light:   Enhances the sense of space for all three rows  Adds luxury and openness to every drive  A rare feature that elevates the entire interior experience  Three-Zone Automatic Climate Control Comfort for every passenger:   Three-zone automatic climate control  Dedicated rear air conditioning  Personalized temperature settings for front and rear occupants Perfect for families, road trips, or simply ensuring every passenger rides in comfort.  Interior  Spacious, Refined, Thoughtfully Designed Inside, the R 350 offers an exceptionally versatile cabin:   Oyster leather upholstery that feels elegant and welcoming  Power-adjustable seating with generous legroom across all rows  Flexible seating and cargo configurations  High-quality materials and solid Mercedes-Benz craftsmanship throughout This is a vehicle built for long journeys, growing families, and refined daily driving.
